2:
Before the vault door, you steel yourself for the impending confrontation. How fortunate that you had the wisdom and foresight to invite several of your fellow adventurers on this journey to the Far East, and how kind they were to agree to help you torment the Red Kojin, for no single warrior, no matter how blessed or powerful, could ever hope to slay a primal on <If(PlayerParameter(4))>her<Else/>his</If> own, despite what some wandering minstrels would have you believe.

※The Pool of Tribute can be accessed via the Duty Finder.
